extension.name: Breadcrumb
extension.description: A datasource that provides XML representing the parent hierarchy. Useful for building breadcrumb navigation.

releases.release: - Fix: Declaration of datasourceBreadcrumb::grab() should be compatible with Datasource::grab() - PSR-12 formatting - Extension is now part of Sym8
- Compatible with Symphony 2.3 - Using new PageManager
- Compatible with the Multilingual Field and Language Redirect extensions
